Title: TH Cards (KBank)
Content:
Xendit Stakeholders

Department

PIC

PIC Role

Sales/ CS

Submitting the request

MO

Kavissara (Praew) ApiratrueangwutKittapat (Pingpong) Srisuphan

Activate channels

Eligibility

Entity Type

Eligible

Sole Proprietorship

✅

Corporation

✅

Non-Local Entities

❌

Partnership

✅

Non-Profit

❌

Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirements

Account Status

The merchant account must be LIVE and the KYC status must be Passed

MID Setup

Regulation from the Bank of Thailand requires each merchant to have their own MID.

SLA

Entity Origin

SLA

All entity

5 to 7 business days

Total SLA

2 - 6 weeks as BAU

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Merchant requests via CS/ MO email/ XDT dashboard

Merchant

MID Creation

2

Send the activation request email with the attached .XLSX file:

  • KPGW และ VCN Online only

  • QRAPI

Additional Document:

[Sub merchant]

  • Company registration/ DBD/ Company affidavit

  • Authorized director ID card

  • Registration page (Screenshot of XDT dashboard or GB dashboard)

  • Business license (If any)

[Xendit document]

  • Application form

  • DBD

  • POA

Recipients:

  • To: wisit.pon@kasikornbank.com

  • CC: k_biz_contact_center@kasikornbank.com, Warunee Sanchai <warunee.s@kasikornbank.com>,

Ratravee Wattanaanggull <ratravee.w@gmail.com>,

Puechamongkol Rungkadee <puechamongkol.r@kasikornbank.com>,

Teerin Sirisatonpun <teerin.s@kasikornbank.com>,

Nanthasorn Romyen <nanthasorn.r@kasikornbank.com>,

Nattapong Sawettaphun <nattapong.sa@kasikornbank.com>,

Unyarat Sermkawinrak <unyarat.s@kasikornbank.com>,

Rittiprasong <peerawas.rittiprasong@xendit.co>

MO

MID Configuration and Testing

3.

Once partner provides the MID/ IpayID from BBL, MO escalate to the engineer team (@hendry.yuwono , @Mathawat (Bas) Watcharapittayapong , @Panida (Nook) Khongchaiman ) via

#th-cards-mid-migration

Activation Flow (One-Time Payment and Installment)

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Once MID is all set, MO can activate the cards channel in retool.

MO

2

Input the Business ID (#1) of the merchant and set Payment Method to CARDS then click Next.

3

a. Check partner and channel GBPRIMEPAY (#1) and click Activate Check Mark (#2) icon

  • Note: Please make sure to only activate the routing rule you want to be activated. Not all routing rules with channel GBPRIMEPAY are expected to be activated!

b. Check whether the routing rules that want to be activated is correct

c. Click Confirm (#3)

d. Scroll right the routing rule list to Status and make sure rule Status set to ACTIVE (#4)


More details here: https://xendit.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/CA/pages/3591536873/Technical+SOP#Bulk-MID-Onboarding-or-Activation

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

If a merchant fails onboarding criteria, the MO agent notifies the requester via the original submission channel:

  • CS: Inform the team to relay the result to the merchant.

  • Direct MO: Respond to the existing email thread.

  • Sales/Slack: Reply within the #mo-request or #thailand-pg-activation-request thread.

MO
